page_metadata.biotools__summary: Scbean integrates a range of models for single-cell data analysis, including dimensionality reduction, remvoing batch effects, and transferring well-annotated cell type labels from scRNA-seq to scATAC-seq and spatial resoved transcriptomics.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Scbean integrates a range of models for single-cell data analysis, including dimensionality reduction, remvoing batch effects, and transferring well-annotated cell type labels from scRNA-seq to scATAC-seq and spatial resoved transcriptomics.
